description: Canonical source URLs for external references the curriculum cites. Used by the link-refresh resolver to find the right successor URL BEFORE falling back to Wayback. Add entries here whenever a vendor consolidates, renames, deprecates, or moves a resource the curriculum links to.

sources.name: Bitnami Helm Charts
sources.rationale: Bitnami moved charts to an OCI registry on Docker Hub in August 2025. The classic Helm repo URL still 302-redirects to a Broadcom mirror, but new content should reference the OCI form.

sources.name: exa (deprecated) -> eza
sources.rationale: exa has been unmaintained since ~2021. eza is the community-maintained successor.

sources.name: AngelList Talent -> Wellfound
sources.rationale: AngelList rebranded their jobs platform to Wellfound in 2024.

sources.name: linuxjourney -> LabEx
sources.rationale: linuxjourney.com was acquired/migrated to LabEx in 2024.

sources.name: Sigstore Fulcio (canonical CA endpoint)
sources.rationale: The Fulcio production CA endpoint. Returns 404 on GET / because it's an API root with no UI — DO NOT treat that as a broken link. Used by cosign / policy-controller via the API path. This is a machine-consumed endpoint and must never be Wayback-substituted.

sources.name: Kubernetes Documentation (canonical)
sources.rationale: Authoritative source for Kubernetes concept docs. Always prefer kubernetes.io over vendor blogs or third-party guides for concept references.

sources.name: Docker Documentation (canonical)
sources.rationale: Authoritative Docker docs. Use docs.docker.com for technical references, NOT docker.com (marketing).

sources.name: MITRE ATT&CK (canonical)
sources.rationale: Authoritative MITRE ATT&CK matrix. The atlas.mitre.org domain hosts the ML-specific ATLAS matrix.

sources.name: MITRE ATLAS for ML (canonical)
sources.rationale: Authoritative MITRE ATLAS adversarial-ML matrix. Subject to 429 anti-bot challenges on probes — do NOT classify a probe failure as link rot.
